name: N.O.V.A.
description:
(@MinUnits@) @TeamAttackDelay@ seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.
(@MinUnits@) Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.

Aatrox: Ally Damage @ShredAndSunder*100@% Shred and Sunders enemiesAatrox: Shred and Sunder enemies
Caitlyn: Grant allies @AS*100@% Attack SpeedCaitlyn: Grant Attack Speed
Akali: Allies gain PrecisionAkali: Allies gain Precision
Maokai: Allies heal @Heal*100@% max HealthMaokai: Heal allies
Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for @ShieldValue@Kindred: Shield an ally
Emblem: Allies deal @BonusTrueDamage*100@% stacking bonus true damageEmblem: Deal bonus true damage
